title: Cobblemon Lofi OST
description: Replace all musics & discs with Pokemon OST lo-fi tracks
body:
Replace **every in-game and menu musics** with **Pokemon OST lo-fi** tracks
Also replace **every disc** with various songs from various pokemon franchises

Does **not adds fight-musics voluntarily** (except for discs) as they kinda break the chill lofi feeling as soon as you start a battle

Originally made for the modpack [Cobblemon Polished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cobblemon-polished)
